name: CosmoSteel Holdings Limited
summary: CosmoSteel Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in sourcing and distributing piping system components. It operates through Energy, Marine, Trading, and Others segments. The company provides steel pipes, fittings, and flanges; and structural and cable products, including structural beams, channels, sheets, plates, flats, and hollow sections. It also offers electrical products, such as switching and distribution systems, terminal and junction boxes and switches, light fittings, and isolators; and carbon, low temp carbon, stainless, duplex, super duplex, high yield, and low alloys steel. In addition, the company provides customization, validation, testing, expedited delivery, and project management services. It serves oil and gas, engineering and construction, petrochemical, power, shipbuilding and repair, manufacturing, pharmaceutical, and trading industries. The company primarily operates in Brunei, Europe, Indonesia, Japan, Malaysia, the Middle East, Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam, and internationally. CosmoSteel Holdings Limited was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Singapore.
